title: Bank of England outlines tokenization, stablecoin vision for UK finance
snippet: The central bank plans to publish draft rules for systemic sterling stablecoins next month and finalize them by the end of this year.

title: Fireblocks launches agentic payment support, joins x402 Foundation
snippet: If even a fraction of the more than 1 billion people who use AI daily delegate authority to AI agents for online spending, stablecoin adoption would grow substantially, a Fireblocks executive said.

title: Revolut rolls out crypto debit card
snippet: Revolut has launched its first physical crypto debit card.

title: Kik founder’s latest app Flipcash first to tap Coinbase’s stablecoin-as-a-service platform

title: Securitize posts record Q1 revenue, $3.4 billion in tokenized assets under management
snippet: Securitize said it now services roughly 650 active funds and processed $1.9 billion in transaction volume during the quarter.

title: Euro stablecoin joint venture Qivalis adds 25 new banks
snippet: Qivalis, the joint venture company formed by European banks to launch a Euro stablecoin, has amassed the support of a further 25 banks, bringing the total number of institutions backing the project to 37.

title: Deel launches stablecoin salary payouts and appoints head of crypto
snippet: Deel, the global people platform trusted by 40,000+ businesses to hire, manage, and pay teams across 150+ countries, today launched stablecoin salary payouts and announced the formation of a dedicated crypto division, headed by Thierry Edde as Head of Crypto at Deel.

title: Euro stablecoin project Qivalis adds 25 banks ahead of launch
snippet: Qivalis expands to 37 banks after adding 25 new members across 15 countries, boosting euro stablecoin plans ahead of a second-half 2026 launch.

title: MoneyGram becomes Tempo's anchor remittance validator
snippet: MoneyGram today announced a partnership with Tempo, a purpose-built Layer 1 blockchain for high-volume, real-world payments, to deepen its blockchain infrastructure and advance stablecoin-based settlement across its global network.

title: European Commission launches MiCA review as global crypto regulatory landscape shifts
snippet: The European Commission launched a MiCA consultation open through Aug. 31, asking whether the crypto framework needs updating.

title: Trump Orders Fed to Review Crypto Firms’ Access to Master Accounts

title: Tether buys SoftBank’s stake in Bitcoin company Twenty One Capital
snippet: The stablecoin issuer bought SoftBank’s 26% stake, expanding its control over the public Bitcoin holder as it moves into lending, mining and capital markets.
